name: The White House
subject: Stories the West Wing is Reading: Tax Cuts and Job Growth
body:
1600 Daily

“IT'S TAX CUTS, IT'S TAX REFORM... WE'RE GOING TO HAVE TREMENDOUS NUMBERS OF JOBS POURING IN.”

- President Donald J. Trump

It has been an incredible week for the American economy: a strong jobs report, the introduction of The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, an impeccably-qualified nominee for Fed Chair, and the announcement of a major corporation’s move to the United States. Since President Trump took office over 1.5 million new jobs have been created.

------------

Newt Gingrich writes that GDP growth has been driven by the Trump Administration's "aggressive deregulatory efforts, its America first position on trade," and that "serious tax cuts will be the key to sustaining 3 percent economic growth - or higher - for years to come."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce764d442917a8656fa87ed1fb07a00fcf0f4febcaa9bd983c4ff24b6f4179340b84b0961b5c1c69685c23bda68af6ed619
Click here to read more.

------------

For more on tax reform, the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce7cfd0e3048a06a477d92696a4ca8d1d7a43456e409da1f1580f244959aa7fa89149a57737a07cae63440f0fe71917e03b
New York Post editorial board writes the House Republicans tax-cut plan “meets the nation’s needs” and “offers the relief for business and the middle class needed to get the economy roaring.”

------------

In economic news, Harriet Torry and David Harrison of the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce75eac61215a291510d209d1ffbc15208412e180440e56de5430508d57367b2f0a591dbbb67a90ae50fb1631a39c6a629f
Wall Street Journal report the unemployment rate is at 4.1%, “its lowest level since December 2000,” and below the 4.2% that economists predicted.

------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce709cccb66adafa37d240e3c4267941a5998e6f8c03dbebb34924e5fc0fe788b2826280a0dfe4ed678d78b7c81374c7f03
Yahoo! News reports the "vital and booming US services sector saw record growth in October, and the data point to continued strength in the months ahead," according to the Institute for Supply Management's non-manufacturing index.

------------

In a
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce7284ad338f93e0cfc0cbb2b293c056756faa6d7b7e16d9d444186c894cdd6b86595eb2de499beab7d7677208831c19625
Washington Examiner opinion piece, Charlie Kirk writes about the “unique and growing role” the millennial generation will play in the economy as they “will make up an estimated three-quarters of the U.S. and global workforce in less than a decade.” President Trump and Republicans in Congress are working together to foster a stronger economy that allows millennials to “work, live, invest, and save” by empowering businesses to invest in American jobs through a slashing of the corporate tax rate.

------------

In an interview with
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce7b469f8d2570353f01a7c4dd8b210c0162888ead51e7ef2c4e64c6ba9ed8eed52e4eddc31e0db8f683bd7f7c5376e5aa8
The Daily Signal, Kevin Hassett, chairman of President Trump’s Council of Economic Advisers, says that the Trump Administration is committed to the "three main non-negotiable objectives for this tax bill. There needs to be a big tax cut for the middle class. There needs to be a corporate tax rate that goes down to 20 percent and makes our country competitive again. And it needs to be a lot simpler..."

------------

The
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce7789f07eb53a4ca33d3f4b15286164b97dd80acf25032897b55e40d0a88efa5600a6f10ca389ba09624fc9e6c58f1fc4f
Washington Post gave four Pinocchios to Democrats spreading false claims on the GOP tax plan that “families making less than $86,100 on average will face a hefty tax hike” when the truth was the opposite.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce7b60581f1e8bcd71572e1376acd224c53b19f93ef31807e27d1251bbcd32c605595e66258d9440b08916bffc59942eaac
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=66e2b91adb685ce7138589674146e38b5bcf3b9af54149e34f3b958034f93779e9aaa907e30c6311011a7d9b7b8935556a3948364c946772
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4aaab104b1165ce36ce544f634d957bccae113da7fe4b1148ac4cf413aefabe4d0030ba4c2d19e1b897cc47aa35e60b19
Unsubscribe

| Dear Peter,
With three days left and the polling tight, we are [launching a new ad](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017bnpj06-HBhM0BX1bLpsU16_0g0vR2TE7oyX-u3jpxeKBhYw-2d1qYnVA_1Godg37Lb8giIf22BR0DVdVW9svrdote8XGysdyaxtee0IFJyM6jaNDcUUi3jhw0Ac_ON40s03sT66M1fpS_db5MfewiLRQLOBsG3nxVMcRB2Tjtk6jCrmrStKRUaRK1_g2hRcn7R7ro1Oh4q01gCunM5kGw==&c=5vDsjqOaOPA7-VusGjPDF8g5TU1rwTKuwwZ1ktv0UZwC_IF7MrteUg==&ch=uZgkVHFpKzldfDZY66pfjIR1lOUjcqbDa7jzJ4L8JHOyByNi8MIYcg==) fighting back against the smears and holding our opponent accountable for his lack of leadership.
The Latino Victory Fund ad attacking Ed Gillespie and conservative men as racists is incredibly offensive and false, and Justin Fairfax's failure to condemn the ad shows a real lack of leadership.
Leaders don't paint an entire group of people as racists and they certainly don't stand by while other people do.
They also don't claim, as Fairfax did, that he just didn't see it.
This is about putting conscience and principle over politics. That's real leadership.

[Watch our new ad here:](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017bnpj06-HBhM0BX1bLpsU16_0g0vR2TE7oyX-u3jpxeKBhYw-2d1qYnVA_1Godg37Lb8giIf22BR0DVdVW9svrdote8XGysdyaxtee0IFJyM6jaNDcUUi3jhw0Ac_ON40s03sT66M1fpS_db5MfewiLRQLOBsG3nxVMcRB2Tjtk6jCrmrStKRUaRK1_g2hRcn7R7ro1Oh4q01gCunM5kGw==&c=5vDsjqOaOPA7-VusGjPDF8g5TU1rwTKuwwZ1ktv0UZwC_IF7MrteUg==&ch=uZgkVHFpKzldfDZY66pfjIR1lOUjcqbDa7jzJ4L8JHOyByNi8MIYcg==)

| It is time to take a stand and fight back against this hateful ad and the vicious smears which corrode our political discourse.
Here's the thing -- Virginians should be able to have an honest difference of opinion on policies without having their character slandered with false accusations of bigotry.
LVF's despicable "murder truck" ad is an attack on the people and character of Virginia.
That is no surprise. LVF's top donor is far-left billionaire George Soros and 99% of the group's money comes from outside Virginia. They are coming here to divide us.
Our opponent is taking their contributions.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, With three days left and the polling tight, we are == fighting back against the smears and holding our opponent accountable for his lack of leadership. The Latino Victory Fund ad attacking Ed Gillespie and conservative men as racists is incredibly offensive and false, and Justin Fairfax's failure to condemn the ad shows a real lack of leadership. Leaders don't paint an entire group of people as racists and they certainly don't stand by while other people do. They also don't claim, as Fairfax did, that he just didn't see it. This is about putting conscience and principle over politics. That's real leadership. == | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | It is time to take a stand and fight back against this hateful ad and the vicious smears which corrode our political discourse. Here's the thing -- Virginians should be able to have an honest difference of opinion on policies without having their character slandered with false accusations of bigotry. LVF's despicable "murder truck" ad is an attack on the people and character of Virginia. That is no surprise. LVF's top donor is far-left billionaire George Soros and 99% of the group's money comes from outside Virginia. They are coming here to divide us. Our opponent is taking their contributions. | | We are fighting back with an ad of our own to launch in every corner of Virginia and we need help getting our message out with just three days left. == Virginians need to see this important contrast in leadership. name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: What’s your opinion of Tax Reform?
body:
| |
---
[ ](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/tax_reform_survey?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171104_trs_s1&n=1)
| In September, I sent a short survey asking you what Congress should accomplish before the end of the year. The number one response was clear: **tax reform**. That’s not surprising given that 36% of Americans go through the complicated process of itemizing their taxes. Simplifying our complicated tax code is certainly not going to make everyone happy. There are going to be tough choices with winners and losers in many categories. Well, on Thursday morning, Republicans unveiled their initial tax plan that, among other things, reduces the number of tax brackets and raises the standard deduction. The media and lawmakers alike are weighing in. But I care more about what you think. I’d really like to get your opinion on a few key elements of the plan. [Would you take about 2 minutes to answer 6 questions and let me know your thoughts?](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/tax_reform_survey?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171104_trs_s1&n=2 "Survey") I will share the results with you, as well as members of Congress. Thank you for taking the time. **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171104_trs_s1&n=3) | | [TAKE THE SURVEY ►](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/tax_reform_survey?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171104_trs_s1&n=4)

Hello!

This is the inaugural edition of "Leah's Weekly Roundup," which will serve as a summary of the news from the campaign trail, following some of the media coverage and social media from the past week.

This week, the national media started learning that Wisconsin conservatives are different than what can be found in D.C. and other states. This is true when it comes to **[where we get our news](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=SeTv6oOIMeEq_xJYKBCOPqXTLXlAMVObAAQa7GtPrqrf_ZP60qmxrHzGYmIA63V9yxQRgo9TgrtRLJtIpNk35NgVBQ-iEojPgkucCdSEe_723vSpJnGGBiwmUgjrdsN0uGGj-gFPEUi8cMu59YvJLtcOs5maufgks1dQaThhypLXbbnPPEFh-7XlsbvJF2bBDR7hQ_Vu02m_naJOhtJ9LJlGrUt3vneyXp4gqBQDkkTnDJVQ-FiGKV6vjJ9I441U9J96TWgcWw82L5uZ0Fjhw1A96O4U7kinHWamd0GVtcNwtttyYwsYPnW8jj_QcmWvpQqz6rM0aWlGJKuh1MbTaB7gsGIMiAna9aUXeJcvzAXDN6CGhJ1azPCoOfrR5xFp)** , and it's true about **[the support we have for our Republicans who keep fighting and working for us back home.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=L-WAU24dXo6jH4lH0QHjjEzOBpKTFRwqPQy-AfqrrjxWi3cLNfPmMHueBThLkCOgratTdSFPXIbjXpXXiLjYOmSDufwPFkvJK6A5q3QKRW0WQ9coUlL15a3pbzhs_9QtGsN05vBfWMj0Q0Tivnemc6MmpDRApU6OwuyIv836cJtLYogxvvTl_RRea0s0ofqp2iacS3xKvPjGXANarXH6pmXfMKdrXWzpMAemXMGsbmb8vhUiZRkG-6RR0UumcIibVCmmeQ4hQKfJJY_fxjBTXLa2QH5xoTrEUD5wpS3WkvxAox0bS3tGfIa_ASXUsUOmXOim3iJs46QGs15g4SWOTYuc7ZPSZZZjkt-glE6uZ_l1wfTgQgfppAMMnv6sxWsm)**

On Wednesday, Leah released **[a new bill in the state Senate that would help lower prescription drug prices](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=7Yn5xG0bLAWntPKk6cBFR4ztaBkAMPuyf9Iba3SQUq1oj5cdrEghfeUqqao24MK06K_mqmKgu-9afzWD5zA2omTaAjnkWJV6nixanBmCfCycs-5xSFFju5qGIIr-vI_eBbPYTXVHSc5g-7xKVyFHsnNIADffuLDhjc4RBg7hWSp5OlFRA5iELg2yh2HUg7lu6sy7y4A0evxNHL-kd2BFIgAJrMNG-Yb8BkBL9WBjufd1Z_LeT5Mmid17OhEhUWfE6q292g3x6pCnJlQdi0-d_R67XrUSiOzYhDxEY-HnSGX-V93MyW9ET8Ub0582Xu2YrR6fVaf-JTzApUF_EbonKzxwdHVqeTiz-Og8FOPz30IIRZTXWQPnNkysWH4mtwECGys5mjUSRtUZUz0VUsmfKQ%3D%3D)** for families and seniors. She also **[called on her Senate colleagues to support the Mining for America bill](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=L-WAU24dXo6jH4lH0QHjjDANgZabrzwEVmTxW9TrCEzAnIIv91ryjIxq4Hul05SVbp2z_GUvRhybpQ8FJTUALKanhvwW8yJSPvZ_VLJOQqN84kVYjU1R06_qbZv5J54MwpEEf3F82sgTIAL1ippXRm7ZHbuJ_5Q7mCgedjhcNInuoBQjW-Z3niwuT2sku3a8Nyzms_GewvERL4qw6U73a3X3cdLlAaRWkDv3xRlL2C-VCfLMIG9Vb41ARuO5Heo0wA5hH8IIkfL6a-E4LTh2rWmWyRUIcRDcD2DAwmRWq-_SwPNH5CRcPRkNABDmLftc) **that will bring more jobs to northern Wisconsin.

Leah's homegrown list of Wisconsin supporters grew significantly Thursday, as Leah **[unveiled more than 100+ endorsements](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=SeTv6oOIMeEq_xJYKBCOPqXTLXlAMVObAAQa7GtPrqpXpzQCUwxiBMInradfvQQqBPna9QWQTJNLQk3ihtiYua1QD7y2K-omfB_9NJExZP-fsTzqqq7xqkZFPbWc_LCqa8XEPgVeYQ42bIAr4lHkgK3t2vKNm4vjjYKIWqWkXfqJSVeWm41PrqZBVLDVaV9zUsmbr5iObJ13vqH8wTc-OL9bn3JL4N0WwAeYsq4iqwcUAv1edZseokIILkuGdMp-7uvGoDVgeBx9sIqj260W14MeamHCuFsM4tjIUPNeMrSYIRNXiM0x-WnI5mJbKV8ipmjm3LXeKD3BBjUk9O1kbg%3D%3D)** from local elected officials, law enforcement, grassroots activists, business leaders and college students. Wisconsinites have seen that Leah is a proven conservative fighter. They know the best way to pass President Trump's agenda, including health care reform and tax reform, is to send someone with her record to the U.S. Senate. If you're interested in also endorsing Leah, **[please fill out the form here.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=SeTv6oOIMeEq_xJYKBCOPniUOyVn-_nvo_Z649rxFbXmGiewLNEgeNJcuVN7XoJK3SRdu1aRGUorS2Eqfo5k28RsfMlfTothuyzNZFiNO1yWmD5UNp6fepUxDj7XRWBd3RTdLHJpy9z9yvC-qGtMYux5mcM5btETbmVv97fLnrGFokqeqXsS-GCa5XoDsOLYDQamklDMkHczjh7_QpBIZZfdN76LkN06IMwXFdXsRvzmmKfWiWhuqG5YTD9WUNpd1X-9fo077rsPhawQmoqLbk60DKvYUD7nHmHgxE7drtR-NoH2xjnrWKTFZCg5N6MYi9f8Cf8JUra_XRo7ksYCN1lneJLjOvMGEmD1MC9ewBdRJYOK_vNJDi_N-mcs20kr_HaL7WryGThms5KvrZ0mckaf1wd3zQj0l_u-hu9Mf7I%3D)**

On Wisconsin!

Team Leah
**News that drove the week** **[Wisconsin State Journal: Leah Vukmir: Kevin Nicholson should apologize for criticizing Paul Ryan](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=RE3ULcDvigBbOKwlqj-Jt0FpiMyjf75wShJH_7m8ElJOhBbrFsjuACDZRLFS0nMYO06XgDHZFquYunWcgBBDJiOEhf4-ZOgPygV9EeEDBR7YxB8pkSSQCAOIPzOGuK9mHsYI98duoh6Uiot394Wv44aLRuu-MCeHpOhDZGPuOnX5IBB8m2qyl6FnB83IukiyKWt3c_GLlbzelRbvRdeUGkn-RunL_QMifF4T3w-_ay4EMHH95l9H0TT28TLCbvChKETx5nEAcsIHGqgKoEZumEqo9xZ_4_38fxvBVuoXHqg_ZAQBbQGj_VQlniKfj9xY8_BdGvCdwSqkwgmklDbD5U4qZilxC4S0WbynkDPzCnK4XRzITsH71WxjS6bfFzKwJ22Y71atmcBH0bxp6lrxzqPiHi19P5HL33pEMUxQ70ML8gufn0gP3Gj35BlETCXoOJrQ0gcUWzsJ4dPwbiTxmQ%3D%3D)**"Vukmir, in a statement, called Ryan 'a friend of mine' and said he 'has never forgotten where he came from or what matters to the people of (Wisconsin’s) 1st Congressional District,' which Ryan represents.

"'Anyone who has spent any time in Janesville knows that Paul Ryan is home all the time and is 100 percent Wisconsin. Who will (Nicholson) attack next, Governor Walker?' Vukmir spokeswoman Jess Ward said in the statement." **[Washington Examiner: Republican primary dustup proves Paul Ryan is no lightning rod back home](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=L-WAU24dXo6jH4lH0QHjjEzOBpKTFRwqPQy-AfqrrjxWi3cLNfPmMHueBThLkCOgratTdSFPXIbjXpXXiLjYOmSDufwPFkvJK6A5q3QKRW0WQ9coUlL15a3pbzhs_9QtGsN05vBfWMj0Q0Tivnemc6MmpDRApU6OwuyIv836cJtLYogxvvTl_RRea0s0ofqpaUMRzZOWnradlyfrr-RtCXtFBlmfN_-smz5hfpGGllL0xjo-pnwa8LtayeuwZfJtUwDHTdaQo6A3x3VWsdRaVgtlINoImqFhdWSXsKp4HAQumtaZRcHN_yYo--mMqlTxgMzPibU4FYbOFnf6C-0fAIQ-8ZmapdzkxtGFcZgsGRp-JevKzTW4EGCtNMqG55nrb_O2zKB79gMXwwIUbASv5Q%3D%3D)**"Nicholson's main primary opponent, state Sen. Leah Vukimir, rushed to Ryan's defense. 'Anyone who has spent any time in Janesville knows that Paul Ryan is home all the time and is 100 percent Wisconsin. Who will (Nicholson) attack next, Governor Walker?' Vukimir's campaign manager asked in a statement. That Vukimir jumped to Ryan's defense is a sound indication of his standing in Wisconsin — it's just bad politics for a candidate to run against Ryan, especially when that candidate is a newcomer who has yet to develop half the goodwill Ryan has with Wisconsin Republicans." **[Leah unveils 100+ Wisconsin endorsements](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=SeTv6oOIMeEq_xJYKBCOPqXTLXlAMVObAAQa7GtPrqpXpzQCUwxiBMInradfvQQqBPna9QWQTJNLQk3ihtiYua1QD7y2K-omfB_9NJExZP-fsTzqqq7xqkZFPbWc_LCqC_b3_GF-XK-rNWlMn6J965Nm4RUH5WAvMx_pPSjPPf4qSeCrPptkBKgOszAJI_mnTH2DjGPiWuCVJNm7-yl7AT1GhFaVYQq1RL9UHHJx2MKGNtTgCK9oarDq6gDfGhnijoq5S5n6WRkv_FjdIa3l2lu57v-wm7OGInsas0Ko6LU69F_2B2rqfxtG-04OvB10WrsN4UzGkhd71OoHPfbCKQ%3D%3D)** U.S. Senate Candidate Leah Vukmir, R–Brookfield, released a list of more than 100 endorsements on Thursday, indicating the homegrown momentum behind her campaign to beat liberal incumbent Sen. Tammy Baldwin in 2018. **[National Journal: In Wisconsin, It’s Bannon vs. Conservative Talk Radio](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=984e43fddfb6459e982ef4fdc3a182d4&_e=SeTv6oOIMeEq_xJYKBCOPqXTLXlAMVObAAQa7GtPrqrf_ZP60qmxrHzGYmIA63V9yxQRgo9TgrtRLJtIpNk35NgVBQ-iEojPgkucCdSEe_723vSpJnGGBiwmUgjrdsN0uGGj-gFPEUi8cMu59YvJLtcOs5maufgks1dQaThhypKZj2lT8cirvBCaqbM8FdNY0PoO4_Vyk3ziSb7d3iGDMWhWsY3UVhaplMZHqAhC5NzDLYAW7YiOG2IK5fSidLnhA62Rq6fIq-ky5o8SA1V3FTdv9GJsULwG5Cv6BGwQT9gzrAYttC95wiFoVXe9BAHgSXCjI5YNrDUdRY4jYDF6b27hwRB29ZZwzaCUiUik7ONyt1mvKvPK8bGDsuIz8o3l)** “For these radio hosts, the term ‘establishment’ doesn’t ring true for Vukmir, despite her relatively long tenure as an elected official. Unlike at the national level, Republican leadership and the grassroots have largely been aligned in Wisconsin. Over the past seven years of statehouse control, they’ve worked together to pass a laundry list of conservative policies, ranging from right-to-work to voter ID to abortion restrictions.

“‘I think Leah Vukmir — and again, I’m not endorsing anybody — I think she’s a strong conservative candidate, and if people try to come in and say that she’s something other than that, there’s going to be a backlash,’ said [Jeff] Wagner, who hosts a morning show on WTMJ in Milwaukee. ‘Because we know her.’” **Leah on social media** [ name: Keith Ellison
subject: [ACA UPDATE] Open enrollment is underway
body:
Enroll today.
---
**Open enrollment to get coverage under the Affordable Care Act for 2018 ends December 15th -- but Trump doesn't want anyone to know about it.

If you need to, apply to get covered today. Then share this message with your loved ones and friends so they can, too.

** **[ENROLL TODAY](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4db/2264850548/VEsH/ "https://www.getamericacovered.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENROLL+TODAY&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd")**
I wanted to send a quick note to make sure you know that open enrollment for Obamacare started on November 1st and continues through December 15th.

Spread the word, Derek! Forward this email, and share the news on **[Twitter](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4d8/2264850548/VEsE/ "https://twitter.com/TheDemocrats/status/926229422868434944?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd")** and **[Facebook](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4d9/2264850548/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/GetAmericaCovered/videos/137311366923741?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd")** so your friends can get covered. And if you need to get enrolled yourself, you can do that right **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4e6/2264850548/VEsC/ "https://www.getamericacovered.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd")**.

You and I both know how important it is to make getting covered as easy and affordable as possible. But Donald Trump and his administration have gone out of their way to make it harder for Americans to enroll.

So far, the Trump administration has:

* Cut the time window for open enrollment in half
* Slashed funding for informational advertising and outreach programs on Obamacare
* Used taxpayer funds to run federally-funded anti-Obamacare campaigns (really!)
* And abandoned state programs that helped people enroll

That means it's on all of us to make sure our family and friends have the information they need to get health insurance.

In spite of all of Trump's sabotage efforts, Obamacare is working. And 62 percent of Americans want to see Obamacare maintained.

**We have to do everything we can to help folks get enrolled -- and I'm calling on your help to do so. If you need to enroll, get started today. And if you're already covered, help get the word out there on Twitter and Facebook so our loved ones and neighbors can get covered too:**

**[ENROLL NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4e7/2264850548/VEsD/ "https://www.getamericacovered.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+ENROLL+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd")**
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](http://my.democrats. "https://www.facebook.com/GetAmericaCovered/videos/137311366923741?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+SHARE+ON+FACEBOOK&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd")**
**[SHARE ON TWITTER](http://my.democrats. "https://twitter.com/TheDemocrats/status/926229422868434944?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+SHARE+ON+TWITTER&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd")**
Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4e2/2264850548/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4e3/2264850548/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4e0/2264850548/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052398a/4067b0a/407f3a96a/7e66b4e1/2264850548/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171104_ke_nd&source=em_20171104_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

subject: This is what hustle looks like >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6c0c/24c69fd9/171a2d7d2/189f0a38/3054530469/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEK09N_digital_email_20171104_ElectionDay2017_inact&source=WQEFEK09N_digital_email_20171104_ElectionDay2017_inact")
---

Peter,

With just **three days to go** until Election Day 2017, every last one of our candidates is on the ground hustling to reach voters.

And of course we're doing everything we can to help.

Which means we're doing what we do best -- gathering support from across the country to tip the scales in some really close races.

**[Donate $3 now to help our candidates' campaigns in this final stretch.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6c0c/24c69fd9/171a2d7d2/189f0a39/3054530469/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171103_email_ElectionDay2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+help+our+candidates+camp&utm_campaign=WQEFEK09N_digital_email_20171104_ElectionDay2017_inact&source=WQEFEK09N_digital_email_20171104_ElectionDay2017_inact")**

Here's what some of our candidates have been up to in the last couple of weeks:

In Washington State, state Senate candidate Manka Dhingra kicked off a canvass and knocked doors with more than 200 campaign volunteers.

In Virginia, first-time candidate Jennifer Carroll Foy traveled across her district -- from local county fairs to churches -- introducing herself to residents and making the pitch on why they should vote for her for the House of Delegates.

In North Carolina, Charlotte mayoral candidate Vi Lyles debated her opponent and shared her vision for the city.

And in Ohio, Cincinnati mayoral candidate Yvette Simpson had a GOTV rally with rapper Talib Kweli to get residents fired up to turn out to the polls.

When we say our women are HUSTLING, we mean it.

**Let's make sure to have their backs. Donate $3 now to help all of our candidates win on Tuesday:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Win-2017](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6c0c/24c69fd9/171a2d7d2/189f0a3a/3054530469/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171103_email_ElectionDay2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWin2017&utm_campaign=WQEFEK09N_digital_email_20171104_ElectionDay2017_inact&source=WQEFEK09N_digital_email_20171104_ElectionDay2017_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List
